title: Student Discipline: Expulsion
description: Expulsion is the most serious form of school discipline, resulting in a student being removed from their regular school setting for a significant period of time. The policy outlines the circumstances under which a student may be expelled, the process the district follows to make that decision, and the educational options available to students during an expulsion. Parents, students, and community members can use this policy to understand their rights and what to expect if expulsion proceedings are initiated.
